abstract: Pulp regeneration in a tooth with pulp necrosis is the research hotspot in current clinical treatment of endodontic diseases. Up to now, the revascularization therapy, which is one of the regenerative endodontic treatment, and the most extensive and effective method in clinical practice, can partially achieve the goal of pulp regeneration and root development in young permanent immature teeth. In order to standardize the technique and improve the curative effect, this atticle discusses the indications, pre-treatment preparation, treatment procedure and the rapeutic evaluation of pulp revascularization therapy.
journal: Zhonghua kou qiang yi xue za zhi = Zhonghua kouqiang yixue zazhi = Chinese journal of stomatology
title: [Clinical management and prognosis evaluation of pulp regeneration therapy].
